diagrams.title: 9-Region Classification
diagrams.description: Shows the 9 regions created by extending clipping window boundaries: center (inside window) plus 8 surrounding regions
diagrams.purpose: Understand outcode assignments and how to quickly identify line positions

diagrams.title: Cohen-Sutherland Algorithm Flowchart
diagrams.description: Step-by-step decision process of the algorithm showing acceptance, rejection, and clipping paths
diagrams.purpose: Visualize algorithm logic and termination conditions

diagrams.title: Intersection Points Calculation
diagrams.description: Shows how intersection points are computed when clipping against each of the 4 boundaries
diagrams.purpose: Learn the mathematical formulas for computing clip intersections

visuals.title: Cohen Sutherland Clipping
visuals.description: Visual diagram for cohen sutherland clipping
